Home.title: Crabagent Console
Home.subtitle: Trace and token governance for OpenClaw.
Home.tracesHint: Open Messages for the list; detail pages use SSE (?token=) when the Collector requires an API key.

Overview.title: Overview
Overview.subtitle: Workspace summary and key metrics will appear here.
Overview.statsSubtitle: Aggregated from Collector Trace / Span samples; date range matches the messages list.
Overview.needCollector: Configure the Collector URL in Settings first.
Overview.sampleNote: Loaded {traces} traces and {spans} spans for charts (within paging caps).
Overview.hintUsage: Total traces in the window (Collector count).
Overview.hintSpanErr: Share of sampled spans in error or timeout.
Overview.hintModelDur: Simple average of LLM span duration_ms.
Overview.hintTokens: Sum of trace total_tokens; MoM compares to the previous window of equal length.
Overview.hintToolDur: Simple average of tool span duration_ms.
Overview.hintTokenSplit: Without prompt/completion split from the API, Input/Output use a 58%/42% split to show dual-series trends.
Overview.hintTokenRate: Daily token sum spread per second.
Overview.hintTtft: Proxied by average LLM span duration (not strict TTFT).
Overview.hintTpot: LLM span duration / tokens scaled to ms/token trend.
Overview.hintModelDist: LLM spans grouped by model field.
Overview.hintModelErrDist: Count of errored LLM spans; finer codes pending API.
Overview.hintToolVol: Daily sum of tool_call_count on traces.
Overview.hintToolOk: Daily success share among tool spans.
Overview.hintAgentModels: Approximate LLM calls per trace-day from spans.
Overview.hintMessages: Traces per day (same scale as volume for a second view).
Overview.hintServiceQps: QPS estimate from daily trace counts.

Logs.title: Logs
Logs.subtitle: Searchable log stream and ingestion history will appear here.

Analytics.title: Analytics
Analytics.subtitle: Token waste heatmap: each column is a user turn in a conversation. Darker red means more prompt tokens (context) relative to completion and visible assistant text — typical of empty spins, tool retries, or oversized history on that turn.
Analytics.wasteHeatmapHint: Rows are recent chats (from inbound messages). Numbers are relative intensity within this sample (0–100). Hover a cell for token totals.
Analytics.wasteHeatmapEmpty: No conversations with user messages yet. Run OpenClaw with the trace plugin, then open Messages to ingest data.
Analytics.wasteLegendDash: — no LLM completion in that turn
Analytics.wasteTooltipNoLlm: No llm_output in this turn window

Machines.title: Machines
Machines.subtitle: Connected hosts and agent runtimes will appear here.

Alerts.title: Alerts
Alerts.subtitle: Notification rules and incident history will appear here.

Settings.title: Settings
Settings.subtitle: Configure how this browser connects to the Crabagent Collector. Values are stored locally in your browser only.
Settings.saveFailed: Could not write to local storage

Messages.executionStepsHint: Click to view detailed execution step information

Steps.name: Name
Steps.executionStepsHint: Click to view detailed execution step information

Traces.title: Messages
Traces.subtitle: Each row is one message (OpenClaw / Opik). Open a session to inspect execution steps, tokens, and metadata.
Traces.searchSpansPlaceholder: Search execution step id, message id, name, session…
Traces.tableSelectAllPage: Select all messages on this page
Traces.filterDialogDescription: Filter by channel, agent, and status. Changes apply when you click Apply.
Traces.filterDialogDescriptionTraces: Filter by status. For channel and agent, use the funnel icons in the table column headers.
Traces.filterDialogDescriptionThreads: Use the funnel icons next to Agent and Channel in the table headers. You can reset all list filters below or clear selections in those menus.
Traces.filterDialogDescriptionSpans: Filter by status here or via the funnel in the table. For channel and agent, use the column header funnels.
Traces.threadsCostHint: Estimated cost aggregated from messages in this session
Traces.threadDrawerLinkHint: Event timeline for this session (types, payloads, and pipeline steps).
Traces.threadDrawerPipelineTypeCount: {count} distinct event type(s) — expand the timeline for JSON.
Traces.threadDrawerMessageTurnCount: {count} turns — select one to view the chat slice.
Traces.threadDrawerLinkEmpty: No message events for this session.
Traces.threadDrawerNoMessages: No messages loaded for this session.
Traces.threadDrawerTurnTokensUnsplit: No prompt/completion split from provider; total ≈ {count} tokens
Traces.tableSelectAllThreadsPage: Select all sessions on this page
Traces.threadsEmptyBody: Sessions appear after the OpenClaw trace plugin ingests batches that include thread rows.
Traces.threadsEmptyFiltered: No sessions match the current search or time range.
Traces.spansEmptyBody: Execution steps appear after messages are ingested with span payloads from the plugin.
Traces.spansEmptyFiltered: No execution steps match the current search or time range.
Traces.tableSubtitle: One row per message_received from the trace plugin. Agent/channel may be backfilled from earlier events on the same thread_key. Search matches message text, titles, agent fields, and ids (including message id).
Traces.empty: No events yet. Run OpenClaw with the plugin enabled.
Traces.stats: {traces} session(s). Each row is the latest activity in that session.
Traces.listMessagesEmpty: No inbound messages yet. This list only includes message_received events from the trace plugin.
Traces.listTraceRecordsEmpty: No messages yet. Rows appear after the gateway ingests events with trace_root_id (trace plugin). Older data without ingest will not show here.
Traces.listTraceRecordsEmptyFiltered: No messages match the current filters. Expand the date range to “All”, clear search, or remove advanced filters.
Traces.searchPlaceholder: Message text, session key, trace_id, agent…
Traces.columnOptimizationHint: Estimated share of tokens avoided by pruning (context_prune_applied), vs spent + saved.
Traces.toolsHint: TOOL execution-step count (before_tool / after_tool, non-memory file ops)
Traces.needCollectorUrl: Set the Collector URL and API key in Settings to load messages.
Traces.probeHint: If counts are zero: ensure Collector is running, URL/API key match, and the gateway plugin is ingesting.
Traces.threadFetchCountTitle: Total rows fetched for this conversation (used for the message list). The right panel only shows the selected message’s slice.
Traces.convThinkingToggleAria: Show request snapshot behind this reply
Traces.convEmptyAssistant: No assistant reply (llm_output) in this slice yet — the run may still be in progress.
Traces.convNoTurn: Select a message to see the conversation view.
Traces.semanticDecisionNodeTitle: Branch: model turned to a tool / IO / memory execution step
Traces.detailRightPanelSubtitle: Only the processing chain for the selected message (same trace_root slice). Other messages in this chat are not shown here.
Traces.confirmDeleteSession: Delete all events for this session? This cannot be undone.
Traces.detailPageHint: Pick a user message to inspect its pipeline slice, semantic execution steps, and raw timeline. The left list loads this conversation’s events; when the Collector is reachable, live updates use SSE.
Traces.detailEmpty: No events for this conversation yet.
Traces.treeHint: Within this message’s slice only: grouped by run id. Rows without run_id are listed first in their group; then chronological order. Green badges = pipeline step. Full chain: user message → model resolve → prompt build → plugin hooks → optional prune → stream context → llm_input / llm_output (and tools per round).
Traces.pipelineModelStreamContext: Cache / stream context snapshot: seq {seq}, ~{msgs} messages, provider {provider}, model {model}. See payload for digests.
Traces.pipelineBeforeModelResolve: Early phase: user prompt {chars} chars. Provider/model are resolved here (no session transcript yet).
Traces.pipelineBeforePromptBuild: Pre-LLM assembly: {history} session messages, user prompt {promptChars} chars. Role mix: {roles}. Plugins (e.g. memory) may still prepend before llm_input.
Traces.pipelineLlmInput: Final model request: {provider} / {model}. History {history} msgs, {images} images. Approx. {delta} chars added after post-bootstrap prompt (plugin prependContext, etc.).
Traces.pipelineHookContribution: Per-plugin mutation · source hook {source} · contributing package {plugin}
Traces.pipelineContextPrune: Context prune ({mode}): messages {before}→{after}, ~chars {cBefore}→{cAfter} (Δ{delta}). Role histograms remain in payload.
Traces.pipelineContextPruneAggregateHint: Aggregate-only event: no per-message rows in payload. If your OpenClaw build adds messageChanges on context_prune_applied, the table appears automatically.
Traces.pipelineContextPruneChangesTruncated: List truncated: more transcript indices changed than rows shown. Inspect full payload below.
Traces.sessionListHint: Grouped by session key or id. Pick one to inspect runs and payloads.
Traces.deleteSessionUnavailable: This bucket has no session_id; server delete is unavailable. Events may still use only session_key.
Traces.userMessagesHint: Each row is one user message. The block under the preview is that message’s observability slice. The right column always shows only the selected message’s full processing chain — not the whole chat.
Traces.sidebarTraceNoTypesYet: Only the inbound row so far — open after the agent runs.
Traces.noTraceRootOnTurn: This turn has no trace_root_id on the event; pipeline events cannot be grouped.
Traces.noLinkedRunDetail: No following llm_input in this message view (or session mismatch). Expand after the agent runs.
Traces.detailMergedOnlyMessagesHint: This session currently has only message_received events in the database — no hooks or LLM rows yet. Usually the agent has not finished a turn, the trace plugin is off, sampling dropped events, or ingest failed. After upgrading Collector, reopen this page: split buckets (session_key vs session_id) are merged when loading events.
Traces.detailPipelineTypeCount: {count} distinct type(s) below — expand the timeline for full JSON payloads.
Traces.noRunEventsYet: No agent run events are linked to this message yet.
Traces.detailTreeNoMatches: No execution steps match the filter.
Traces.detailNoTokenStats: No token usage in this span payload.
Traces.detailFeedbackPlaceholder: Feedback and annotations are not wired yet.
Traces.semanticTreeHint: Nested by Collector `parent_id`: Agent loop → LLM → tools / IO / memory. Click a node to inspect payloads, tokens, and context diff.
Traces.semanticTreeEmpty: No execution steps in this slice.
Traces.semanticTreeEmptyDetail: No rows in `spans` for this message id yet (run a full agent turn with observability ingest). Use the raw event timeline below.
Traces.semanticTreeNeedTraceRoot: This message has no trace_root_id — semantic tree needs a linked agent run.
Traces.inspectorEmpty: Select a node on the left to see input/output, context diff, and token metrics.
Traces.inspectorToolPayloadHint: Tool returned ~{kb} KB — consider preprocessing or summarizing before the model sees it.
Traces.inspectorContextDiffHint: Line-based diff: lines only in “before” (left) are treated as removed after pruning / assembly. Reordered lines may be mislabeled.
Traces.inspectorPromptCompareHint: Word-level diff: red strikethrough = removed on the left, green = added on the right.
Traces.inspectorPromptCompareTooLarge: Content is too long for word-level diff; using line-level comparison (switch below if needed).
Traces.noTurnsExtracted: No user messages or llm_input rows found in this message view.
